body:
Because "highest-rated" can depend on which platform you look at (Yelp, Google, Thumbtack, or Angie's List), there isn't just one single technician or company that holds an absolute monopoly on the top spot. However, a few highly-rated companies and local specialists consistently stand out in San Ramon based on recent customer reviews:

### 1\. Top Local Independents (Highest Individual Ratings)

If you prefer a highly-rated local independent business where you deal directly with the owner or a dedicated local team, these have near-perfect ratings:

  * **Graham Garage Doors:** A local staple serving San Ramon for over 32 years. They hold a perfect **5.0-star rating** on Google (with lower volume but stellar long-term reliability) and are known for 24/7 emergency repair and no-pressure service. [5 Best San Ramon, CA Garage Door Repair Companies - Expertise.com](https://www.expertise.com/home-improvement/garage-doors/california/san-ramon#:~:text=Graham%20Garage%20Doors%20is%20a,for%20emergency%20repairs%2024%2F7.)[5 Best San Ramon, CA Garage Door Repair Companies - Expertise.com](https://www.expertise.com/home-improvement/garage-doors/california/san-ramon#:~:text=Garage%20Door%20Installation-,Residential,Why%20choose%20this%20provider%3F)

  * **Doorgi Garage Doors:** Holds a **5.0-star rating** on local platforms like Angie's List. Customers frequently praise their technicians for being transparent and thorough with spring replacements and opener recalibrations. [Top 10 Best Garage door pros in San Ramon, CA - Angie's List](https://www.angi.com/companylist/us/ca/san-ramon/garage-doors.htm#:~:text=%2B22,helped%20fix%20my%20garage%20door.)

  * **Same Day Garage Door Repair:** Based directly in San Ramon (on Twin Creeks Drive). They feature an expert named Larry who has over 30 years of experience, and they hold a **4.9-star rating** on Yelp. [5 Best San Ramon, CA Garage Door Repair Companies - Expertise.com](https://www.expertise.com/home-improvement/garage-doors/california/san-ramon)[5 Best San Ramon, CA Garage Door Repair Companies - Expertise.com](https://www.expertise.com/home-improvement/garage-doors/california/san-ramon#:~:text=Garage%20Door%20Installation-,Commercial,Why%20choose%20this%20provider%3F)

### 2\. Top High-Volume Regional Teams

If you are looking for a larger company with hundreds of reviews that can get a technician to your house almost instantly, these are the highest-rated:

  * **Precision Garage Door Service (East Bay):** They maintain an average **4.8 to 4.9-star rating** across thousands of reviews. In San Ramon specifically, local technicians like **Carlos Larios** , **Jose Brizuela** , and **Travis Behn** are frequently singled out by name in 5-star reviews for being fast, courteous, and excellent at explaining mechanics. [Garage Door Repair Reviews in San Ramon, CA (Updated June 2026)](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/reviews/city/san-ramon#:~:text=When%20the%20job%20was%20done,Date%3A%2005%2F29%2F2024)

  * **Ace's Garage Door Repair & Installation:** While located nearby in Hayward, they heavily serve San Ramon and boast a **4.8 on Google (over 500 reviews)** and **4.5 on Yelp**. They are highly rated for 24/7 emergency availability and fully-stocked trucks. [5 Best San Ramon, CA Garage Door Repair Companies - Expertise.com](https://www.expertise.com/home-improvement/garage-doors/california/san-ramon#:~:text=%3D%20Featured%20Provider,Why%20choose%20this%20provider%3F)

### 3\. Highly Rated "Diamond Certified" Options

For rigorous, independently verified tracking, the highest-rated Diamond Certified options serving San Ramon include:

  * **Contra Costa Door** * **R & P Garage Doors** (averaging **4.8 out of 5 stars** across hundreds of verified customer satisfaction surveys).

**A Quick Tip Before You Hire:** When calling, ask if the technician who rolls up is a subcontractor or a direct employee, and ensure they provide a diagnostic quote _before_ they begin changing out springs or openers.

Are you looking for a quick emergency repair (like a snapped torsion spring), or are you looking to get quotes for a brand-new garage door installation?

By the way, to unlock the full functionality of all Apps, enable [Gemini Apps Activity](https://myactivity.google.com/product/gemini).
